generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign suppliers for critical medical supplies like vaccines and antibiotics puts our national security at risk? During the pandemic, we saw how vulnerable we were when global supply chains broke down. Supporting strategic autonomy isn't just about military strength—it's about ensuring we can protect our citizens in times of crisis. #NationalSecurity #HealthSafety
